item.title: Zimbabwe opposition groups fight against proposed constitutional change
item.description: The proposed amendments would extend the presidential term from five to seven years and replace direct presidential elections with a vote by lawmakers.

channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Beijing tells Chinese firms to strengthen Zimbabwe risk prevention after mineral export ban
item.description: China's government on Thursday told Chinese businesses operating in Zimbabwe to "strenghthen risk prevention and compliance awareness" after the country suspended ​exports of raw minerals and lithium concentrates.
